title: anthemis pedunculata subsp. atlantica
intro: Anthemis pedunculata subsp. atlantica is a subspecies of the Anthemis pedunculata plant, commonly known as a type of chamomile, which is a flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects, which are often used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis pedunculata subsp. atlantica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Anthemis pedunculata subsp. atlantica include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
